purpose: Scaffolded contract mapping app routes to Next.js API, backend, native parity, plugin, and voice/action surfaces.

route_contract.exemption_reason: Public landing route uses chrome-free marketing layout.
Compatibility redirect route only launches the canonical portfolio/dashboard entry.
Compatibility redirect route only launches the canonical analysis entry.
Fullscreen import flow uses FullscreenFlowShell instead of standard AppPageShell.
Fullscreen onboarding flow owns its own shell and safe-area spacing.
Labs route is intentionally isolated from the primary app shell.
Auth-only route intentionally bypasses the signed-in app shell.
Logout route is a transitional auth screen, not a standard content page.
Legacy connection route now deep-links into the canonical /consents access manager.
Legacy portfolio explorer route now deep-links into the dedicated /ria/clients/[userId] workspace.

api_dependencies.native_transport: CapacitorHttp direct backend via ApiService.apiFetch on native
CapacitorHttp direct backend via ApiService.apiFetch on native
CapacitorHttp direct backend plus client vault/PKM services

native_plugin_dependencies.reason: Vault unlock and client-held KYC connector key material stay outside the Next.js server.
Consent status and export authorization must preserve the native consent boundary.

thread_and_consent_contract.local_plaintext_cleanup: drop local draft/export payloads after terminal or non-ready workflow states

route_contract.exemption_reason: Public shared portfolio view uses chrome-free layout for external recipients.
Redirect route that forwards to /profile/pkm-agent-lab or /profile in production.
Mandatory post-login phone verification flow intentionally bypasses the signed-in app shell.
RIA onboarding is a five-step fullscreen setup flow that owns its own compact content rhythm.
Compatibility alias routes into the shared consent workspace.
Compatibility alias routes into the canonical profile/settings surface.
Compatibility alias now redirects into the dedicated /ria/clients/[userId] client workspace.
